data.title: LG Electronics projects B2B sales to surpass $14.6 billion in 2025
data.description: The company's sharpened focus on B2B is part of a broader initiative to enhance structural competitiveness and pursue qualitative growth.

data.title: Domaine expands B2B capabilities on Shopify
data.description: Randy Higgins and Brad Borman — both alumni of Merkle and its B2B-focused agency Shift7 — have joined Domaine as managing directors of B2B.

data.title: Salesforce reaches $8 billion deal to acquire Informatica
data.description: Marc Benioff, the CEO and chairman at Salesforce, called the Informatica acquisition the result of two decade of discussions.

data.title: What a court ruling striking down tariffs means for B2B ecommerce
data.description: For now, analysts advise B2B ecommerce firms to stay vigilant, maintain flexible sourcing strategies, and be ready to pivot in response to what remains a highly politicized and unpredictable trade landscape.

data.title: Dubai’s ecommerce market to reach $13.8 billion by 2029
data.description: The emirate’s ecommerce market is projected to grow from AED 32.3 billion (USD $8.8 billion) in 2024 to AED 50.6 billion (USD $13.8 billion) by 2029.
